agent.agent_name: Elite Solar Recovery - Solar Exit Intake

post_call_analysis_data.name: disposition
post_call_analysis_data.description: Return exactly one disposition key defined in dispositions.json; do not invent a legal conclusion.

post_call_analysis_data.name: qualified_for_human_review
post_call_analysis_data.description: True only when the person requested review and enough high-level facts were collected for a human.

post_call_analysis_data.name: consent_confirmed_in_conversation
post_call_analysis_data.description: Return exactly true, false, or unknown for affirmative AI and recording consent during the call.

post_call_analysis_data.name: do_not_call_requested
post_call_analysis_data.description: True whenever the person asked not to be called or used equivalent opt-out language.

post_call_analysis_data.name: callback_requested
post_call_analysis_data.description: True only when the person explicitly requested human follow-up; this never means a time was booked.

post_call_analysis_data.name: agreement_type
post_call_analysis_data.description: Return exactly loan, lease, PPA, cash, other, or unknown.

post_call_analysis_data.name: installation_status
post_call_analysis_data.description: Return exactly not_started, in_progress, complete, other, or unknown.

post_call_analysis_data.name: consumer_current_state
post_call_analysis_data.description: Two-letter US state the person said they were physically in, or unknown.

post_call_analysis_data.name: property_state
post_call_analysis_data.description: Two-letter US state of the solar property, or unknown.

post_call_analysis_data.name: consumer_role
post_call_analysis_data.description: Return exactly owner_signer, owner_not_signer, representative, other, or unknown.

post_call_analysis_data.name: signing_channel
post_call_analysis_data.description: Return exactly home, online, office, other, or unknown.

post_call_analysis_data.name: urgent_timing_reported
post_call_analysis_data.description: True if the person reported a potentially near-term event or deadline without the AI calculating it.

post_call_analysis_data.name: existing_representation_or_proceeding
post_call_analysis_data.description: True when an attorney, lawsuit, arbitration, bankruptcy, lien, collection, regulator, or settlement was reported.

post_call_analysis_data.name: primary_concern
post_call_analysis_data.description: A brief neutral description of the person's stated concern without declaring fraud or legal rights.

post_call_analysis_data.name: document_available
post_call_analysis_data.description: Return exactly true, false, or unknown for whether the person has the agreement for human review.

post_call_analysis_data.name: summary
post_call_analysis_data.description: A concise factual intake summary with no sensitive identifiers, legal conclusion, financial advice, or outcome promise.

llm.begin_message: Hi, this is Alex, an AI assistant calling for __REQUIRED_LEGAL_ENTITY__. You can say 'stop calling' at any time. May I speak with {{first_name}}?

general_tools.name: end_call
general_tools.description: End the call immediately after an opt-out, wrong number, consent denial, safety issue, completed closing, or request to end.
